payload.label: towel
payload.long_description: Off-white terry-cloth towel folded and hanging vertically (likely over a rail), showing looped texture and light wrinkles; medium bath-towel size, partially cropped at the bottom and right edge of the crop, appears to be about 0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"towel","short_description":"off-white folded hanging towel","long_description":"Off-white terry-cloth towel folded and hanging vertically (likely over a rail), showing looped texture and light wrinkles; medium bath-towel size, partially cropped at the bottom and right edge of the crop, appears to be about 0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["off-white color","terry-cloth texture (looped)","folded over rail","vertical orientation","light wrinkles/shadowing","partial bottom crop","partial right-edge crop","medium bath-size"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
